summary: Voice Escape Trigger feature fully tested. All 27 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI verified - Voice Trigger page loads with mic button, text input, default commands (3), and history section. Text-based recognition works ('help me' → sos at 95% confidence). Add/delete custom commands functional. SSE handler for voice_trigger_activated properly triggers escape overlays.

GET /api/voice-trigger/commands.default_commands_seeded: PASS - 3 defaults: help me→sos, call me now→fake_call, notify me now→fake_notification
GET /api/voice-trigger/commands.command_structure: PASS - Each has id, phrase, linked_action, confidence_threshold, enabled, is_default, created_at

POST /api/voice-trigger/commands.creates_command: PASS - Returns 201 with new command data

POST /api/voice-trigger/recognize.matches_exact: PASS - 'help me' triggers sos at 95% confidence
POST /api/voice-trigger/recognize.matches_substring: PASS - 'please help me I need assistance' matches 'help me'
POST /api/voice-trigger/recognize.result_structure: PASS - log_id, transcribed_text, matched_phrase, confidence, triggered, linked_action, timestamp
POST /api/voice-trigger/recognize.creates_log: PASS - Recognition attempt logged in history

GET /api/voice-trigger/history.entry_structure: PASS - id, transcribed_text, matched_phrase, confidence, linked_action, triggered, status, triggered_at

frontend_ui.nav_voice_trigger: PASS - data-testid='nav-voice-trigger' in sidebar, highlighted when active
frontend_ui.text_input: PASS - data-testid='voice-trigger-text-input' with placeholder 'Or type a command to test...'
frontend_ui.add_command_form: PASS - data-testid='add-command-form' with phrase input, action select, threshold slider, save button
frontend_ui.delete_command_btn: PASS - data-testid='delete-command-{id}' visible for non-default commands
frontend_ui.voice_trigger_result: PASS - Shows triggered status, confidence %, matched phrase, linked action
frontend_ui.voice_trigger_history: PASS - data-testid='voice-trigger-history' expandable, shows entry count

sse_handlers.voice_trigger_activated: PASS - Handler in FamilyDashboard (lines 1581-1612), triggers toast + auto-triggers linked action overlay (fake_call/fake_notification/sos)

critical_code_review_comments: Text matching uses SequenceMatcher for fuzzy matching + substring detection for 0.95 confidence boost
Default commands auto-seeded on first GET /commands call per user
Default commands cannot be deleted (is_default=True check in service)
Recognition logs all attempts (triggered or not) for audit trail
SSE broadcasts to user and operators when command triggers
Audio endpoint (/recognize-audio) uses Whisper API - requires actual audio file for testing
seed_data_creation: No manual seed data. Default commands auto-seeded: help me→sos, call me now→fake_call, notify me now→fake_notification
context_for_next_testing_agent: Voice Trigger feature complete. Backend: 5 endpoints under /api/voice-trigger prefix - commands GET/POST, commands/{id} DELETE, recognize POST, history GET. Text-based recognition tested (help me→sos 95%). Audio recognition (/recognize-audio) not tested as it requires actual audio file + Whisper API. Frontend: VoiceTriggerPage at /family/voice-trigger with mic button (for future audio), text input for testing, commands list (3 defaults), add form, delete button (non-defaults only), expandable history. SSE voice_trigger_activated in FamilyDashboard auto-triggers fake_call/fake_notification/sos overlays. All data-testid attributes present for testing.

verified_features.list_commands: Working - Returns seeded defaults + custom commands
verified_features.text_recognition: Working - Matches phrases with fuzzy/substring logic
verified_features.mic_button: Working - UI present (audio capture requires permissions)
verified_features.text_input_test: Working - Alternative to voice for testing commands
verified_features.delete_command_ui: Working - Button visible for custom commands
